response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced individual contributor with strong software craftsmanship skills, but he entirely lacks the executive leadership and organizational scaling experience required for a CTO role. His background does not demonstrate managing engineering organizations, governing outsourced teams, or architecting complex, production-grade multi-agent AI credit systems.
strengths: Over 15 years of hands-on software engineering experience across diverse domains and tech stacks.
Proven experience building high-throughput microservices and event-driven architectures (e.g., handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby).
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP, and developer tooling for agentic workflows.
concerns: Zero executive leadership or engineering management experience; career history is strictly as an individual contributor (Senior/Staff).
Lacks the required experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people and building technical leadership layers.
No demonstrated track record architecting AI-native fintech infrastructure, such as real-time credit risk or algorithmic working-capital allocation.
